{{Quote|We were hiding in the armory and then bam! The whole wall just fell down. Three tons of duracrete reduced to rubble by the business end of an MTT…I'm not ashamed to admit that we surrendered.|Hexler Pend|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>}}
'''Hexler Pend''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|Officer]] for the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] who was stationed in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. His group was attacked by [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT's]] during their blockade of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Char-stub}}
